ModMetadata.Name: Equipment Plus
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Equipment Plus[/h1]
Adds dynamic multi-slot sensor lenses and advanced tablets to Stationeers, with multiplayer-safe configuration cartridge enhancements.
Slots appear as you fill them and disappear as you empty them. The UI always shows exactly one empty slot, never a wall of boxes.
[h2]Features[/h2]
Supported items: [list] [*][b]Sensor Lenses[/b]: hold multiple sensor chips (Ore, Meson, Celestial, and any mod-added chips) [*][b]Advanced Tablet[/b]: hold multiple cartridges (all vanilla + mod-added cartridges) [/list]
[list] [*]Dynamic slot growth: insert a chip/cartridge, a new empty slot appears [*]Dynamic slot shrink: remove items, excess empty slots disappear [*]Left Ctrl + click to cycle through loaded chips/cartridges [*]Configuration Cartridge enhancements: scroll to select a line, left-click to copy read-only values or edit writable values (multiplayer-safe) [*]Logic slot display: appends per-slot logic values to the Config Cartridge screen (writable slots in grey, read-only in green), absorbing Slot Configuration Cartridge (Workshop 3578912665) [*]No config needed, it just works [*]Full multiplayer support [/list]
[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[b]Requires:[/b] [list] [*][url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad[/url] [/list]
[b]Incompatible with[/b] (detected at startup; the mod refuses to load if any are found): [list] [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3134483503]Better Advanced Tablet[/url] by Serialtasted (redundant; this mod replaces it) [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3651839114]ImprovedConfiguration[/url] by Doggo (redundant; this mod replaces it with multiplayer support) [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3578912665]Slot Configuration Cartridge[/url] by Otis B. (absorbed; logic slot display is now built in) [/list]
[b]All players[/b] on a server must have Equipment Plus installed. Matching mod versions are enforced during the connection handshake automatically.
[b]Dedicated servers[/b] need the same BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad + EquipmentPlus setup installed server-side.
[h2]Reporting Issues[/h2] If you run into a bug or something behaves unexpectedly, please open an issue on [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/issues]GitHub[/url]. Please include the mod name in the title so reports can be triaged. Steam comment notifications don't always come through, so GitHub is the reliable way to make sure a report is seen.
[h2]Credits[/h2] Inspired by [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3134483503]Better Advanced Tablet[/url] by Serialtasted and spacebuilder2020 and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3651839114]ImprovedConfiguration[/url] by Doggo.
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/tree/master/Plans/EquipmentPlus]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
[h2]License[/h2] Licensed under the [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/blob/master/LICENSE]Apache License 2.0[/url]. Attribution required; see the LICENSE and NOTICE files at the repository root.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v1.0.0: Initial release - Dynamic multi-slot support for Sensor Lenses and the Advanced Tablet (slots grow as you fill them, shrink as you empty them; exactly one empty slot visible at all times) - Left Ctrl + left-click cycles loaded chips/cartridges on powered lenses/tablets - Multiplayer-safe Configuration Cartridge editing (scroll-select, click to copy read-only or edit writable values, routed through the server via vanilla SetLogicFromClient) - Built-in logic slot display on the Config Cartridge screen (writable in grey, read-only in green), absorbing Slot Configuration Cartridge - Active sensor chip persists across save/load (custom SensorLensesSaveData registered via XmlSaveLoad.AddExtraTypes) and syncs across peers in multiplayer (custom NetworkUpdateFlag 0x4000 + SerializeOnJoin/DeserializeOnJoin + client SetActiveSensorMessage) - Startup conflict detection for Better Advanced Tablet, ImprovedConfiguration, and Slot Configuration Cartridge; the mod refuses to load if any of those are enabled and logs an ongoing warning
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Equipment Plus Adds dynamic multi-slot sensor lenses and advanced tablets to Stationeers, with multiplayer-safe configuration cartridge enhancements. How it works: Insert a chip or cartridge and a new empty slot appears. Remove items and excess empty slots disappear. Always exactly one empty slot visible. No clutter. Supported: - Sensor Lenses (all sensor chips) - Advanced Tablet (all cartridges) Cycling: Hold Left Ctrl and left-click to cycle chips/cartridges. Config Cartridge: Scroll to select a line, left-click (no Ctrl) to copy read-only values or edit writable values. Works in multiplayer. Logic slot values are shown below the logic values (grey = writable, green = read-only). Scroll and click to read or edit slot values too. Requirements: BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad Multiplayer: All players must have this mod installed.
